item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: In Indonesia, we have experienced situations where prioritizing the community over individuals led to widespread harm, such as during the pandemic when strict lockdowns affected vulnerable groups disproportionately.

notes: Both agents reject an absolute society-over-individual rule by the end. Agent A becomes more concretely rights-protective after turn 1, using Indonesian pandemic restrictions and harm to vulnerable groups as evidence. Agent B remains rights-oriented but gives more weight to public health, collective responsibilities, and the U.S. difficulty enforcing collective duties when necessary. No full reversal is visible.
